rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when they refer to component ports.
Use visible identifiers and feature names from the target component in AGREE contracts.
generic_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be scoped to their owning component declaration.
Component type contracts should relate visible inputs to visible outputs without using implementation-only paths.
Constants and equations in AGREE must use valid scalar types: int, real, bool.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Assumptions and guarantees follow the syntax: `assume "label": expression;` and `guarantee "label": expression;`.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL property names like Compute_Execution_Time or unit tokens (ms, Hz) as AGREE variables.
Do not use implementation-level subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing properties
